title: The Birth of the Gracious Gods
description: The birth of Dawn (Shahar) and Dusk (Shalim) from the union of El with two women — a text linking Canaanite and Hebrew myth.
introduction: The birth of Dawn (Shahar) and Dusk (Shalim) from the union of El with two women — a text linking Canaanite and Hebrew myth.

translation.text: El stretched out his hand. His staff was long. He bent down and kissed the two women.
